rationale: The citing paper’s stated core contribution is private-label umbrella rebranding effects (intrinsic strength, price/promotion/assortment elasticities), whereas the cited paper is centered on business-cycle moderation of price and advertising elasticities, indicating only partial topical overlap. The matched evidence is just a single DOI reference entry (no in-text citation context or reference text), so there is not enough evidence to confirm substantive use or to safely classify it as clearly incidental.
